discussion_posts.name: CaptainKidd
discussion_posts.content: Future readers please do not rely on this style of implementing the Trie Tree data structure as anything other than academic purity. Use a hashmap instead so you don\'t blow your interview time writing a 30 line boilerplate component for a TrieNode when you could do the same in two lines.
